atfPropertyHighlights.name: Sparkling clean
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests have rated this property 10.0/10 on cleanliness

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Top Value
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests rated this property 9.2/10 on value for money

description.short: Conveniently situated in the Takengon part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

features.featureName: Hot water linen and laundry washing

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room is clean, friendly standards.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room is clean and tidy, hot water is available, friendly staff, breakfast is provided.
comments.originalComment: Kamar bersih dan rapi, tersedia air panas, staf ramah, tersedia sarapan pagi.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The place can be cleaned up.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: According to the price, there is just no lift, so it's a bit difficult to climb the stairs to the 3rd floor. Also, after 8:30, the hot water doesn't work.
comments.originalComment: Sesuai harga hanya tidak ada lift kalau di lt3 agak susah naik tangganya. Dan lewat jam 8.30 air panasnya ga nyala

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is clean, the staff is friendly, and it is located in the city center.
comments.originalComment: Hotel bersih, stafnya ramah dan lokasinya di tengah kota.
